title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
